metadata.title: Automatic List Management
metadata.description: Automatically renumber numbered lists as you edit them.

regex.target: .setName("智能粘贴")
.setName("始终从 1 开始编号")

regex.source: .setDesc("Pasting keeps the sequencing consistent with the original numbered list.")
regex.target: .setDesc("粘贴时保持与原有序号的连续性。")
.error("处理鼠标点击时发生错误:", error)

regex.source: name: "Renumber lists: in selection or at cursor"
regex.target: name: "对列表重新编号: 在选区或光标处"
name: "对列表重新编号: 整篇笔记"

regex.source: name: "Reorder checkboxes: in selection or at cursor"
regex.target: name: "对复选框重新排列: 在选区或光标处"
name: "对复选框重新排列: 整篇笔记"

regex.source: name: "Delete all checked Items in note"
regex.target: name: "删除全部已勾选项"

regex.source: text: "Enter single characters separated by spaces (case-insensitive). Default: 'X'."
regex.target: text: "输入单个字符（空格分隔，不区分大小写）。默认值： 'X'."

regex.source: text: "Example: '- /' means tasks with [x], [-], or [/] will be removed, while tasks with other characters like [>] will remain."
regex.target: text: "示例：输入 '- /' 表示将删除包含[x]、[-]或[/]的待办项，而其他字符如[>]的项将保留。"
.setName("缩进宽度")
.setName("任务列表")
.setName("变更时自动排序")
.setName("置底已勾选项")
.setName("排序所有特殊复选框")
.setName("删除字符配置")
.setName("有序列表")
.setName("变更时自动重新编号")

regex.source: .setDesc("Automatically sort checklists whenever checkboxes are checked or unchecked.")
regex.target: .setDesc("勾选/取消勾选复选框时自动对任务列表进行排序。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Automatically sort numbered lists as changes are made.")
regex.target: .setDesc("内容变更时自动对有序列表重新排序。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Whether lists always start from 1 or preserve their original starting numbers.")
regex.target: .setDesc("选择列表始终从1开始编号，或保留其原始起始数字。")
.setPlaceholder("输入字符")
.appendText("更多信息请访问 ")

regex.source: .appendText("When enabled, tasks with any special checkbox characters will be sorted according to ")
regex.target: .appendText("启用时，含任意特殊复选框字符的任务将根据 ")

regex.source: .appendText(". When disabled, only tasks marked for deletion will be sorted.")
regex.target: .appendText(" 排序。禁用时仅排序标记为删除的任务")

regex.source: .error(       `reorderAllListsInRange is invalid with index=${start}, limit=${limit}. editor.lastLine()=${editor.lastLine()}`     )
regex.target: .error(       `reorderAllListsInRange 函数调用无效=${start}, limit=${limit}. editor.lastLine()=${editor.lastLine()}`     )

regex.source: .error(           `renumbering range is invalid with index=${start}, limit=${limit}. editor.lastLine()=${editor.lastLine()}`         )
regex.target: .error(           `renumbering 范围无效=${start}, limit=${limit}. editor.lastLine()=${editor.lastLine()}`         )
name: "在光标位置"
name: "已选择列表"
name: "所有编号列表笔记"
.setName("实时更新")
.setName("标签缩进大小")

regex.source: .setDesc("Automatically update numbered lists as changes are made.")
regex.target: .setDesc("自动更新编号列表以反映更改。")

regex.source: .setDesc("The first item of every numbered list is 1.")
regex.target: .setDesc("每个编号列表的第一个项目都是1。")
